# Product Reviews

Product reviews that are verified-purchase carry a badge and are given greater weight in calculating the average rating compared to unverified reviews. Customers have a period of ninety days after delivery to submit their reviews. Additionally, any reviews that include profanity or personal information are moderated and removed within one business day.

[Source: product_information.md#product-reviews]
